targets.query: SELECT max("value")  /3500 FROM "wattmon_std_mv" WHERE ("did" =~ /.*Inv*./ AND "f" = 'AC_Active_Power' AND "dlid" = '44B7D09EA775') AND  value >0 AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m), "did", "f" fill(null)
SELECT last("value") FROM "wattmon_std_mv" WHERE ("f" = 'Active_Irradiance' AND "dlid" = '74D5C6CF2D57') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m), "did", "f" fill(null)
